title: Canadian housing affordability ratios
description: Each ratio uses the same fixed 2017 Q1 reference and is published separately; there is no combined housing-stress score.
plainLanguageSummary: Each ratio uses the same fixed 2017 Q1 reference and is published separately; there is no combined housing-stress score.
howToRead: Compare direction, turning points, and sustained divergences. Use the tooltip for exact values and observation dates; visual alignment alone does not establish causation.

calculation.formula: Published indices and explicitly labelled derived changes; no interpolation across native frequencies.
calculation.explanation: Each ratio uses the same fixed 2017 Q1 reference and is published separately; there is no combined housing-stress score.
calculation.example: A value at date t uses only observations dated t or earlier unless the chart explicitly labels a visual shift.

patternsToWatch: Turning points or divergences that repeat across historical episodes
limitations: Each ratio uses the same fixed 2017 Q1 reference and is published separately; there is no combined housing-stress score.
